texto: Watching From Withing protagonist Dr. Jesse Baine says, "The only place I can fathom that is truly private is the space between your ears. Think about the sheer number of surveillance systems, automated ID tracking and police brain-print scanners. What is privacy anyhow? And, why would anyone protest the advancement of such tried and true [surveillance] technology? That’s a bit like rising-up against the aspirin!” -Daniel LaMonte
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Daniel LaMonte: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Watching From Withing protagonist Dr. Jesse Baine says, "The only place I can fathom that is trul…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fantasy, political-fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e political-fiction.

texto: Daniel, I was asked of a budding author, how do you know if your story is on track? My answer: I start by knowing my intention, my target. Then, with purpose, I write the scene that unfolds before me, as faithfully as is human. - Daniel LaMonte
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Daniel LaMonte que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Daniel, I was asked of a budding author, how do you know if your story is on track? My answer: I …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, author, fantasy-fiction, com foco em inspiracao e fantasy-fiction.
